opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: My head feels like it's going to explode, the light is burning my eyes, and I can't stop vomiting. This is my partner writing for her because she can't even look at the screen. It's been going for two days now and nothing is touching it.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: It's been getting worse for two days and now she can't keep any water or her tablets down at all.

symptom_narrative.onset: started about two days ago with the usual warning — some flickering/zigzag lights in her vision first
symptom_narrative.duration: about 48 hours and it hasn't let up
symptom_narrative.character: intense throbbing/pounding on one side, around the temple
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: she says it's the worst headache she's ever had and she can't function at all
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: mostly one side of her head, around the temple and behind the eye
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: constant since it started, built up over hours rather than hitting all at once
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: nothing really — lying in a pitch black silent room takes the edge off a tiny bit
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: any light or noise, and moving around
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: really bad nausea and she's vomited a few times today, feels foggy and slowed down, very sensitive to light
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: she gets migraines and has for years, but they've been coming more often lately and this one is far worse than usual
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: completely bedbound, needs the room dark and silent, hasn't been able to eat or drink

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: gets migraines, has done for years and they've been more frequent lately
past_medical_history.how_managed: usually takes a tablet for them when they start

current_medications_as_reported.name_as_patient_states: a tablet she takes when a migraine starts (sumatriptan)

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: her partner is very worried about how slowed-down and drowsy she seems and how much she's been vomiting

objective_data_offered.value: no fever — around 36.7 when we checked with the thermometer at home
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: single reading on a home thermometer
single reading on an uncalibrated home cuff while unwell

objective_data_offered.value: her pulse feels fast, like her heart is racing
lying in a completely dark room with her eyes shut, can't tolerate any light on the video at all
partner reports she has vomited three times today and can't keep any water or tablets down; she looks pale, drained and washed out
